channel.title: Harborist — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by Harborist (harborist).

item.title: CVE-2026-15921 · 3.1 LOW 🌩️ — nvm path traversal via a malicious mirror's LTS codename writes outside the alias directory
item.description: Node Version Manager (nvm) is a POSIX-compliant shell function for managing multiple node.js versions. In versions 0.32.1 through 0.40.5, `nvm ls-remote` (and other commands that refresh remote LTS aliases, such as `nvm install --lts`) parse the node…

item.title: CVE-2026-13311 · 8.7 HIGH 🌩️ — shell-quote parse() is quadratic in token count, enabling denial of service
item.description: shell-quote prior to 1.8.5 finalizes parsed tokens in parse() using Array.prototype.concat as a reduce accumulator, which reallocates and copies the entire growing array on every iteration. As a result parse() runs in O(n^2) time relative to the numb…

item.title: CVE-2026-12143 · 8.7 HIGH 🌩️ — form-data does not escape CR/LF/quote in multipart field names and filenames (CRLF injection)
item.description: form-data is a library for creating readable multipart/form-data streams. In versions through 4.0.5, the `field` argument to `FormData#append` and the `filename` option are concatenated verbatim into the `Content-Disposition` header without escaping…

item.title: CVE-2026-9277 · 9.2 CRITICAL 🌩️ — shell-quote `quote()` does not validate object-token shapes, allowing command injection via line terminators in `.op`
item.description: shell-quote's `quote()` function did not validate object-token inputs against the operator model used by `parse()`. The `.op` field was backslash-escaped character by character using `/(.)/g`, which in JavaScript does not match line terminators (\n,…

item.title: CVE-2026-8723 · 6.3 MEDIUM 🌩️ — qs.stringify crashes on null/undefined entries in comma-format arrays under encodeValuesOnly
item.description: ### Summary `qs.stringify` throws `TypeError` when called with `arrayFormat: 'comma'` and `encodeValuesOnly: true` on an array containing `null` or `undefined`. The throw is synchronous and not handled by any of qs's null-related options (`skipNulls`…

item.title: CVE-2026-2391 · 6.3 MEDIUM 🌩️ — qs's arrayLimit bypass in comma parsing allows denial of service
item.description: ### Summary The `arrayLimit` option in qs does not enforce limits for comma-separated values when `comma: true` is enabled, allowing attackers to cause denial-of-service via memory exhaustion. This is a bypass of the array limit enforcement, similar…

item.title: CVE-2025-15284 · 6.3 MEDIUM 🌩️ — arrayLimit bypass in bracket notation allows DoS via memory exhaustion
item.description: Improper Input Validation vulnerability in qs (parse modules) allows HTTP DoS.This issue affects qs: < 6.14.1. Summary The arrayLimit option in qs did not enforce limits for bracket notation (a[]=1&a[]=2), only for indexed notation (a[0]=1). This is…

item.title: CVE-2025-9288 · 9.1 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Missing type checks leading to hash rewind and passing on crafted data
item.description: Improper Input Validation vulnerability in sha.js allows Input Data Manipulation.This issue affects sha.js: through 2.4.11.

item.title: CVE-2025-9287 · 9.1 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Missing type checks leading to hash rewind and passing on crafted data
item.description: Improper Input Validation vulnerability in cipher-base allows Input Data Manipulation.This issue affects cipher-base: through 1.0.4.

item.title: CVE-2025-7783 · 9.4 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Usage of unsafe random function in form-data for choosing boundary
item.description: Use of Insufficiently Random Values vulnerability in form-data allows HTTP Parameter Pollution (HPP). This vulnerability is associated with program files lib/form_data.Js. This issue affects form-data: < 2.5.4, 3.0.0 - 3.0.3, 4.0.0 - 4.0.3.

item.title: CVE-2025-6547 · 9.1 CRITICAL 🌩️ — On Node.js < 3, pbkdf2 silently disregards Uint8Array input, returning static keys
item.description: Improper Input Validation vulnerability in pbkdf2 allows Signature Spoofing by Improper Validation.This issue affects pbkdf2: <=3.1.2.

item.title: CVE-2025-6545 · 9.1 CRITICAL 🌩️ — pbkdf2 silently returns predictable uninitialized/zero-filled memory for non-normalized or unimplemented algos supported by Node.js
item.description: Improper Input Validation vulnerability in pbkdf2 allows Signature Spoofing by Improper Validation. This vulnerability is associated with program files lib/to-buffer.Js. This issue affects pbkdf2: from 3.0.10 through 3.1.2.
